summary: Iteration 33 - Options Greeks & Kelly Criterion Features Testing PASSED. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 AI Guards verified in frontend with working toggles. New features kelly_sizing and greeks_filter fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/ai-guards/status returns all 8 guards including kelly_sizing and greeks_filter
VERIFIED: POST /api/ai-guards/update toggles kelly_sizing and greeks_filter correctly
VERIFIED: GET /api/position-sizing returns kelly, suggestion, stats, streak, drawdown, capital_curve
VERIFIED: POST /api/position-sizing/mode changes mode to conservative/balanced/aggressive
VERIFIED: GET /api/options/greeks returns delta, gamma, theta, vega and IV analysis
VERIFIED: GET /api/options/chain-greeks returns 11 strikes around ATM with CE/PE greeks
VERIFIED: GET /api/options/iv-analysis returns IV summary, portfolio greeks, positions
VERIFIED: Frontend shows all 8 guards with correct labels
VERIFIED: 'Smart Position Sizing (Kelly)' and 'Options Greeks & IV Filter' toggles visible and clickable
VERIFIED: Max Daily Loss shows 'Always ON' badge and 'BLOCKING' status
VERIFIED: Kelly and Greeks toggles can be switched ON/OFF from UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4.8.0 features fully verified. New AI Guards: kelly_sizing (Smart Position Sizing using Kelly Criterion) and greeks_filter (Options Greeks & IV Filter). Both guards have working toggles in frontend. Kelly sizing shows mode, win_rate, total_trades, consecutive_losses. Greeks filter blocks options with low score (<25). Position sizing mode can be changed to conservative/balanced/aggressive. Options Greeks endpoints calculate Black-Scholes delta, gamma, theta, vega and IV. Chain-greeks returns 11 strikes around ATM.

options_chain_greeks_endpoint.returns: 11 strikes around ATM with CE/PE greeks

frontend_verification.greeks_toggle: PASS - Toggle switch visible and clickable
